messages.content:
Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) offer a compelling alternative by iteratively refining partially corrupted sequences, enabling bidirectional context utilization and parallel generation~\citep{li2025survey,yu2025discrete,gulrajani2023likelihood}.
However, MDLMs face substantial friction in both training and serving.
Unlike the dense supervision of AR, MDLMs typically employ ELBO-style masked objectives that provide sparse supervision, leading to poor sample efficiency~\citep{lou2024discrete,nie2024scaling,arriola2025block}.
Furthermore, the absence of KV caching and the requirement for iterative whole-sequence denoising often negate the theoretical speedups of parallel decoding, resulting in high wall-clock latency~\citep{nie2025large,ye2025dream}.
  
缩减一个单词

Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) offer a compelling alternative by iteratively refining partially corrupted sequences, enabling bidirectional context utilization and parallel generation~\citep{li2025survey,yu2025discrete,gulrajani2023likelihood}.
However, MDLMs face substantial friction in training and serving.
Unlike the dense supervision of AR, MDLMs typically employ ELBO-style masked objectives that provide sparse supervision, leading to poor sample efficiency~\citep{lou2024discrete,nie2024scaling,arriola2025block}.
Furthermore, the absence of KV caching and the requirement for iterative whole-sequence denoising often negate the theoretical speedups of parallel decoding, resulting in high wall-clock latency~\citep{nie2025large,ye2025dream}.

**更改说明：**
删除了第二句中的 **"both"** ("...friction in **both** training and serving" $\rightarrow$ "...friction in training and serving")。

Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) offer a compelling alternative by iteratively refining partially corrupted sequences, enabling bidirectional context utilization and parallel generation~\citep{li2025survey,yu2025discrete,gulrajani2023likelihood}.
However, MDLMs face substantial friction in both training and serving.
Unlike the dense supervision of AR, MDLMs employ ELBO-style masked objectives that provide sparse supervision, leading to poor sample efficiency~\citep{lou2024discrete,nie2024scaling,arriola2025block}.
Furthermore, the absence of KV caching and the requirement for iterative whole-sequence denoising often negate the theoretical speedups of parallel decoding, resulting in high wall-clock latency~\citep{nie2025large,ye2025dream}.

**更改说明：**
删除了第三句中的 **"typically"** ("MDLMs **typically** employ..." $\rightarrow$ "MDLMs employ...")。保留了 "both"。

这里有几个不同的单词可以删除，您可以根据语境选择最合适的一个：

**选项 1：删除最后一句话中的 "often"（推荐，不改变核心语义）**

> Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) offer a compelling alternative by iteratively refining partially corrupted sequences, enabling bidirectional context utilization and parallel generation~\citep{li2025survey,yu2025discrete,gulrajani2023likelihood}.
> However, MDLMs face substantial friction in both training and serving.
> Unlike the dense supervision of AR, MDLMs typically employ ELBO-style masked objectives that provide sparse supervision, leading to poor sample efficiency~\citep{lou2024discrete,nie2024scaling,arriola2025block}.
> Furthermore, the absence of KV caching and the requirement for iterative whole-sequence denoising negate the theoretical speedups of parallel decoding, resulting in high wall-clock latency~\citep{nie2025large,ye2025dream}.

**选项 2：删除第三句话中的 "style"**
(原句：ELBO-style masked objectives $\rightarrow$ ELBO masked objectives)

> ...Unlike the dense supervision of AR, MDLMs typically employ **ELBO masked objectives** that provide sparse supervision...

**选项 3：删除最后一句话中的 "wall-clock"**
(原句：high wall-clock latency $\rightarrow$ high latency)

> ...resulting in **high latency**~\citep{nie2025large,ye2025dream}.

**选项 4：删除最后一句话中的 "theoretical"**
(原句：negate the theoretical speedups $\rightarrow$ negate the speedups)

> ...often negate the **speedups** of parallel decoding...
